# Seller Returns and Refunds

This policy explains how returns and refunds work from the seller's side, complementing the customer-facing Returns and Refunds Policy.

## Return Window

- Customers may request a return within 30 days of delivery, consistent with the customer Returns and Refunds Policy.
- Items must be unused and in their original condition with tags and packaging, unless the item arrived damaged or defective.

## Your Responsibilities

- Review and authorise eligible return requests promptly (within 2 business days).
- Provide a return address or prepaid label as required by the reason for return.
- Inspect returned items on arrival and issue the refund without undue delay once the return is confirmed.

## Who Pays Return Shipping

- For seller-fault returns (wrong, damaged, or defective item), you cover return shipping.
- For buyer-remorse returns (no longer wanted, ordered by mistake), the customer may bear return shipping unless you choose to offer free returns.

## Refund Processing

- Approved refunds are returned to the customer's original payment method.
- The referral fee for the item is credited back to you when you refund, minus any non-refundable processing fee (see Fees and Payouts).

## Disputes

- If you and a customer cannot agree, ShopEase may step in to mediate. Maintaining accurate listings, valid tracking, and prompt communication protects you in disputes.

## Restocking

- A reasonable restocking fee may apply to certain buyer-remorse returns where disclosed on the listing and permitted by marketplace rules.
